title: acer opalus subsp. intermedium
intro: Acer opalus subsp. intermedium, also known as the intermediate field maple, is a subspecies of the field maple tree, scientifically classified as Acer campestre subsp. intermedium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Acer opalus subsp. intermedium include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and lower blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of certain health conditions.
